At grid (2,2): cell (1,1) pattern[2][2] = g, cell (3,2) pattern[0][2] = g
So at (2,2) they agree (both g), but at (2,1) they disagree (W vs g).
This means the mapping can't be a simple W→X, g→Y. Unless...
